validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-ELEMENTS')
contracts=json.loads((root/'P3_ELEMENTS_ARTIFACT_CONTRACTS.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for artifact in contracts['required_artifacts']:
    schema=json.loads(Path(artifact['schema_ref']).read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    assert artifact['minimum_fields'] == schema['required'], artifact['artifact_id']
    assert artifact['record_minimum_fields'] == schema['required'], artifact['artifact_id']
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: schema-bound element artifact minimum_fields match current required schema fields

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
contracts=json.loads(Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-ELEMENTS/P3_ELEMENTS_ARTIFACT_CONTRACTS.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
required={'artifact_id','stage_id','fixture_id','path','schema_ref','schema_payload_key','source_refs','upstream_artifact_refs','upstream_hashes','validator_ref','review_gate','promotion_state','invalidation_inputs'}
for artifact in contracts['required_artifacts']:
    assert artifact['container_shape'] == 'artifact_envelope_with_payload', artifact['artifact_id']
    assert set(artifact['artifact_envelope_fields']) == required, artifact['artifact_id']
    assert artifact['schema_payload_key'] == 'records', artifact['artifact_id']
    assert artifact['payload_shape'] == 'records_array', artifact['artifact_id']
    assert artifact['record_minimum_fields'] == artifact['minimum_fields'], artifact['artifact_id']
assert contracts['semantic_source_model_rule']['inventory_role'] == 'index_and_verification_skeleton'
projection=contracts['canonical_projection_rule']
assert any('ADOPT_AS_IS' in item and 'ADOPT_NORMALIZED' in item for item in projection['included'])
assert any('REQUEST_CLARIFICATION' in item and 'ROUTE_PRODUCT_GAP' in item for item in projection['excluded'])
assert projection['join_keys']
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: all element artifacts declare envelope fields, records payload, record minimum fields, semantic source model rule, and canonical projection rule

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-ELEMENTS')
artifacts=json.loads((root/'P3_ELEMENTS_ARTIFACT_CONTRACTS.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
rules=json.loads((root/'P3_ELEMENTS_PIPELINE_RULES.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
validation=json.loads((root/'P3_ELEMENTS_VALIDATION_MATRIX.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
trace=json.loads((root/'P3_ELEMENTS_TRACEABILITY_MAP.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert len(artifacts['required_artifacts']) == 7
assert len(rules['ordered_steps']) == 9
assert len(rules['element_rules']) == 11
assert len(validation['validation_rows']) == 9
assert len(trace['traceability_rows']) == 9
assert all(not obj.get('open_blockers') for obj in [artifacts, rules, validation, trace])
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: artifact contracts, pipeline rules, validation rows, and traceability rows are structurally complete

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-ELEMENTS')
scope=json.loads((root/'SCOPE_REPORT.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for path in scope['actual_writes']:
    assert Path(path).is_file(), path
assert scope['forbidden_write_violations'] == []
assert scope['repository_files_modified'] is False
assert scope['control_locks_modified'] is False
assert scope['p3_closure_candidate_modified'] is False
assert scope['not_a_spec_lock'] is True
assert scope['not_a_build_lock'] is True
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: scope report actual writes exist and no forbidden repository, lock, P1, P2, prior P3 candidate, or root P3 phase files changed
